_instructions: Copy this file to vci_email_data_[mmm_yyyy].json. Fill all fields. Run: python build_vci_email.py --json vci_email_data_jun2026.json --output vci_email_body.html

nvidia_alerts._note: Include one entry per candidate with >=3 signals. Delete this section if none.
nvidia_alerts.thesis_sentence: Long-read sequencing platform with NHS deployment underway and proteomics latent TAM exceeding 10x analyst consensus.

candidates._note: One entry per candidate. ACS >=45 only shown in E2 table. Rank by ACS descending.
